description.value: A slim dagger with fine etching along the blade. The markings look decorative, possibly ceremonial.

unidentified.description: A slim dagger with fine etching along the blade. The markings look decorative, possibly ceremonial.

cursedMeta.decoyAppearance: Dagger +1. A finely etched blade. +1 to attack and damage rolls. Finesse, light, thrown.
cursedMeta.trueNature: The blade accumulates sound energy with each strike. Escalates from a faint ring to an audible tone to a full scream that disrupts stealth and terrifies nearby creatures. At Phase 3 the scream fires randomly, even sheathed. Resonance-sensitive: reacts to nearby magic (v2+).

lure.name: Dagger +1
lure.description: A finely etched dagger with a keen edge. You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

curse.name: The Keening
curse.description: The blade absorbs sound energy with each strike. Over time the energy builds and the dagger begins to scream. At Phase 2 the blade hums audibly when drawn, preventing surprise. At Phase 3 the scream erupts on attacks and randomly while sheathed, breaking stealth and frightening nearby creatures. The scream is both a curse and an accidental weapon: allies must keep their distance during combat.

hints: The etching on the blade vibrates faintly when tapped. The frequency is too low to hear, but you can feel it in your teeth.
Detect Magic shows evocation threaded through the enchantment. Unusual for a combat weapon.
The dagger is warm after use. Not from friction. From inside.

escalation.label: Ring
escalation.effect: A faint ring on each strike. Audible only to the wielder and anyone within 5 ft. Could be mistaken for metal resonance. No mechanical effect.
escalation.playerHint: The blade rings after each strike. A clear, bright tone that fades slowly.

escalation.label: Tone
escalation.effect: The blade hums audibly when drawn. Enemies cannot be surprised while the wielder has the dagger equipped. The dagger cannot be discarded. The sound is obvious to the whole party.

escalation.label: The Keening
escalation.effect: Full reveal. The dagger screams on every other attack (50% chance). The scream also fires randomly outside combat (GM discretion or 1/hour). Creatures within 15 ft must make a WIS save DC 12 or be frightened until the end of their next turn. This affects allies. Disadvantage on Stealth while equipped. The party needs to keep their distance from the wielder during fights. Rename, description update.

apply.name: Keening Dagger
apply.descriptionAppend: Curse: The Keening. The blade screams. On each attack there is a 50% chance the dagger shrieks, forcing creatures within 15 ft to make a WIS save DC 12 or be frightened until end of their next turn. This affects allies. The scream also fires randomly outside combat. Disadvantage on Stealth. The dagger cannot be discarded without Remove Curse.

removal.notes: T1. Base Remove Curse (3rd) frees the creature, silences the keening. Over-levelled Remove Curse (5th) purges the item entirely. The dagger falls silent.
